<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace DI\Definition\Source; use DI\Definition\Exception\InvalidDefinition; use DI\Definition\ObjectDefinition; /** * Source of definitions for entries of the container. * * @author Matthieu Napoli <matthieu@mnapoli.fr> */ interface Autowiring { /** * Autowire the given definition. * * @throws InvalidDefinition An invalid definition was found. */ public function autowire(string $name, ?ObjectDefinition $definition = null) : ?ObjectDefinition; }
